title: Modular On-Chip Droplet Sensor System — Design Files and Firmware
description: Open-source hardware design files and firmware for a modular, on-chip sensor system for flow and monodispersity analysis in droplet-based microfluidics. Includes PCB Gerbers and drill files for three sensor boards (optical flow sensor, LED board, velocity sensor), 3-D STEP/STL exports for all mechanical parts, and microcontroller firmware for both sensor subsystems. Companion to a manuscript submitted to HardwareX.
